target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; structural debris piled at base; visible collapse of load-bearing elements; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for load-bearing wall structures.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The right wing of the building shows complete collapse of its upper floors and roof; structural elements are missing; debris pile indicates total loss of structural integrity; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence: one central structure with extensive facade loss and collapsed roof, and a right-wing section with complete upper floor and roof collapse. The overall scene depicts a street-level view of severely damaged multi-story buildings with widespread debris and structural collapse, indicating total destruction of the assessed targets. The functional impact is likely complete loss of habitation and use for the assessed buildings, with the scene suggesting a non-operational urban environment.
